endpoints.name: Lists apps
endpoints.description: List all applications for the specified account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: Creates an app
endpoints.description: Creates an application with the specified properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: Lists app keys
endpoints.description: Lists the API keys associated with the application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Creates a key
endpoints.description: Creates an API key for the application specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Updates a key
endpoints.description: Update the API key with the specified key ID, for the application with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{KEY_ID}} with a real key_id.

endpoints.name: Revokes a key
endpoints.description: Revokes the API key with the specified ID, with the Application ID. This deletes the key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{KEY_ID}} with a real key_id.

endpoints.name: Lists namespaces
endpoints.description: List the namespaces for the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Creates a namespace
endpoints.description: Creates a namespace for the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Deletes a namespace
endpoints.description: Deletes the namespace with the specified ID, for the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{NAMESPACE_ID}} with a real namespace_id.

endpoints.name: Updates a namespace
endpoints.description: Updates the namespace with the specified ID, for the application with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{NAMESPACE_ID}} with a real namespace_id.

endpoints.name: Lists queues
endpoints.description: Lists the queues associated with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Creates a queue
endpoints.description: Creates a queue for the application specified by application ID. The properties for the queue to be created are specified in the request body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Deletes a queue
endpoints.description: Delete the queue with the specified queue name, from the application with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{QUEUE_ID}} with a real queue_id.

endpoints.name: Lists Reactor rules
endpoints.description: Lists the rules for the application specified by the application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Gets a reactor rule by rule ID
endpoints.description: Returns the rule specified by the rule ID, for the application specified by application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{RULE_ID}} with a real rule_id.

endpoints.name: Deletes a Reactor rule
endpoints.description: Deletes a Reactor rule
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id. Replace {{RULE_ID}} with a real rule_id.

endpoints.name: Deletes an app
endpoints.description: Deletes the application with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Updates an app
endpoints.description: Updates the application with the specified application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Updates app's APNs info from a `.p12` file
endpoints.description: Updates the application's Apple Push Notification service (APNs) information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get token details
endpoints.description: Get token details
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ABLY_API_KEY}} with your ABLY API KEY.
